expectations.text: KB markdown file was created/updated under a kb/ directory
expectations.evidence: kb_file.md shows content written to /tmp/kb-eval-2-with/kb/powerball.md — correct location

expectations.text: File contains a ## section heading relevant to connection pools or 503 errors
expectations.evidence: ## API 503 errors — connection pool exhaustion fix — clear, accurate heading

expectations.text: Content captures the key facts: pool_size, value 100, pool_timeout, value 30
expectations.evidence: Bullets mention 'pool_size to 100' and 'pool_timeout to 30s' explicitly

expectations.text: Agent confirmed what was saved and the file path
expectations.evidence: result.md documents topic saved, file path, and 'created' status from upsert.sh

expectations.text: No unsubstituted template placeholders (e.g. {{topic}}) left in the output file
expectations.evidence: kb_file.md line 10: '## 1 {{topic}}' — placeholder from kb.template.md was not substituted by upsert.sh (script only replaces {{project}} and {{date}})
